1.description: get Drammen municipality number and geometry

9.description: find nearest quick-clay for each building and compute distance

10.description: sort by distance ascending and then limit to 10

SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]

-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_as: "count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: spatial_join
-- left_source: 7
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- right_source: 8
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

3.description: reduce flood polygons to Drammen extent by intersecting kommuner and flomsoner

5.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood polygons

6.description: deduplicate buildings (one row per building) keeping representasjonspunkt geometry

8.description: compute nearest quick-clay distance for each flooded building

9.description: sort buildings by nearest quick-clay distance ascending
